message:
🐛 Fix shift+click: dual keyboard API + splash logo + debug logging (#93)

- Use both HardwareKeyboard and RawKeyboard APIs for macOS modifier
  key detection (HardwareKeyboard has known bugs on macOS)
- Add splash screen logo + branding during startup
- Debug logging to /tmp/click_debug.log to diagnose modifier detection

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
